allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: hatchling package path for src/ layout:*)

Bash(git commit -m 'fix: truncate tool responses to 6000 chars to prevent token exhaustion:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: room name resolver with cache and fuzzy matching:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: force tool_choice=required on first LLM call:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'perf: compress timetable API responses before sending to LLM:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove client-side date filter, API handles it via ?date=:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: proper history management - no tool results in context:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: whitelist + per-user rate limiting:*)
